analytics_notice: By participating in this beta, you consent to the collection of anonymous data, which we use to improve the product. You can find more information about which data we track in our <2>Privacy Policy</2> and our <6>Cookie Policy</6>.

call_ended_view.create_account_prompt: <0>Why not finish by setting up a password to keep your account?</0><1>You'll be able to keep your name and set an avatar for use on future calls</1>
call_ended_view.feedback_prompt: <0>We'd love to hear your feedback so we can improve your experience.</0>
call_ended_view.headline: {{displayName}}, your call has ended.
call_ended_view.not_now_button: Not now, return to home screen

developer_mode.always_show_iphone_earpiece: Show iPhone earpiece option on all platforms

custom_livekit_url.from_config: Currently, no overwrite is set. Url from well-known or config is used.
custom_livekit_url.label: Custom Livekit-url

developer_mode.duplicate_tiles_label: Number of additional tile copies per participant

Comptibility.description: Compatible with homeservers that do not support sticky events (but all other EC clients are v0.17.0 or later)
Comptibility.label: Compatibility: state events & multi SFU

Legacy.description: Compatible with old versions of EC that do not support multi SFU
Legacy.label: Legacy: state events & oldest membership SFU

Matrix_2_0.description: Compatible only with homservers supporting sticky events and all EC clients v0.17.0 or later
Matrix_2_0.label: Matrix 2.0: sticky events & multi SFU

developer_mode.mute_all_audio: Mute all audio (participants, reactions, join sounds)

disconnected_banner: Connectivity to the server has been lost.

error.call_not_found_description: <0>That link doesn't appear to belong to any existing call. Check that you have the right link, or <2>create a new one</2>.</0>
error.connection_lost_description: You were disconnected from the call.
error.e2ee_unsupported_description: Your web browser does not support encrypted calls. Supported browsers include Chrome, Safari, and Firefox 117+.
error.generic_description: Submitting debug logs will help us track down the problem.
error.insufficient_capacity_description: The server has reached its maximum capacity and you cannot join the call at this time. Try again later, or contact your server admin if the problem persists.
error.matrix_rtc_transport_missing: The server is not configured to work with {{brand}}. Please contact your server admin (Domain: {{domain}}, Error Code: {{ errorCode }}).
error.open_elsewhere_description: {{brand}} has been opened in another tab. If that doesn't sound right, try reloading the page.
error.room_creation_restricted_description: Call creation might be restricted to authorized users only. Try again later, or contact your server admin if the problem persists.
error.unexpected_ec_error: An unexpected error occurred (<0>Error Code:</0> <1>{{ errorCode }}</1>). Please contact your server admin.

group_call_loader.banned_body: You have been banned from the room.
group_call_loader.call_ended_body: You have been removed from the call.
group_call_loader.knock_reject_body: Your request to join was declined.

home_dashboard.description: Start a new meeting right away, join an existing one, or schedule one for later.

errors.invalid_join_target: Enter a valid room link, room alias, or room ID.

home_dashboard.instant_call_description: Create a new room and join immediately.
home_dashboard.join_call_description: Use a meeting link, room alias, or room ID to join a meeting that already exists.
home_dashboard.join_call_hint: Accepted formats: full meeting links, #room-alias:server, or !room-id:server.
home_dashboard.join_call_placeholder: Paste a join link or room alias
home_dashboard.recent_rooms_description: Rooms you recently opened stay here so you can return quickly.
home_dashboard.schedule_card_description: Set the title and time now so you can start it or share the link later.
home_dashboard.title: Start, join, or schedule a meeting.

join.description: If you already have a link or room reference, go straight to the existing meeting.
join.title: Join from a link

schedule.description: If the meeting happens later, create it now and start it when the team is ready.
schedule.title: Schedule ahead

start.description: If the meeting starts now, create the room and enter immediately.
start.title: Start immediately

join_existing_call_modal.text: This call already exists, would you like to join?
join_existing_call_modal.title: Join existing call?

status.label: Before you continue
status.ready_body: Check your camera and microphone before you enter. You can change devices or permissions from settings without leaving this page.
status.waiting_body: Keep this page open while the host reviews your request. Your microphone and camera settings will stay ready for when you are allowed in.
status.audio_off: Microphone is off. Turn it on now if you want to speak when you join.
status.video_off: Camera is off. Turn it on now if you want to join with video.
status.settings_hint: Use Settings if you need to switch devices or review permissions.
status.participants_present: {{count}} people are already in the call.
status.participants_empty: No one is in the call yet.

lobby.waiting_for_invite: Request sent! Waiting for permission to join…

login_context: Sign in with your internal organization account to continue to the meeting workspace.
login_redirect_context: Sign in to continue to the page you were trying to open: {{target}}
login_auth_links: <0>Create an account</0> Or <2>Access as a guest</2>
login_sso_helper: Use your organization account to continue. Guest access and account creation are disabled.
login_subheading: Sign in to continue to the meeting workspace.

meeting_planner.description: See live and upcoming meetings, start them, or copy join links.

attendance.none_present: No one is in the room now

meeting_planner.empty_description: Scheduled meetings will appear here so you can start them or share the link.

errors.clipboard_unavailable: Clipboard is not available in this browser.
errors.future_start_required: Choose a future date and time for a scheduled meeting.
errors.joinable_room_failed: Failed to create a joinable room for the meeting.
errors.start_required: Choose both a date and a time before scheduling the meeting.
errors.title_required: Enter a title before scheduling the meeting.

meeting_planner.guidance: You have {{liveCount}} live meetings and {{scheduledCount}} scheduled meetings in one place. Use this list to separate what needs attention now from what still needs the host to start.
meeting_planner.live_guest_hint: This meeting is already live, so you can enter right away.
meeting_planner.live_host_hint: This meeting is already live. Join it now or open details to manage it.
meeting_planner.live_hint: Live meetings can be joined immediately.
meeting_planner.modal_description: Date and time are split intentionally so the browser picker stays predictable instead of hiding time selection behind a single unstable field.
meeting_planner.modal_heading: Add the meeting details first, then return to the meetings list.
meeting_planner.scheduled_guest_hint: This meeting has not started yet. Open the details and wait for the host to start it.
meeting_planner.scheduled_hint: Scheduled meetings can be started when you are ready.
meeting_planner.scheduled_host_hint: Start this meeting when the team is ready so participants can enter smoothly.
meeting_planner.title: Live and upcoming meetings

meeting_scheduler.description: Set the meeting title and start time, then share the join link when you are ready.

errors.allowed_users_required: Add at least one invited user before saving an invite-only meeting.

form.allowed_user_ids_description: Enter one Matrix user ID per line. The host is always allowed automatically.

next_steps.one: Choose a time first so everyone gets the right expectation about when this meeting opens.
next_steps.title: What happens next
next_steps.two: After saving, share the join link and start the meeting when the team is ready.

policy_help.host_approval: Anyone with the link can ask to join, but the host has to approve them first.
policy_help.invite_only: Only the people you list here can enter with the meeting link.
policy_help.open: Anyone with the meeting link can enter when the room is available.

summary.title: This meeting will be created with the following rules

success.clipboard_unavailable: Clipboard is not available in this browser.
success.copy_failed: Failed to copy the meeting link.
success.description: Your meeting is ready. Share the join link now, and start the meeting when you are ready.
success.link_hint: Copy it now, or select it manually if clipboard access is blocked.
success.next_step: Next: share the join link, then start the meeting when you are ready.
success.title: Your meeting is ready

meeting_scheduler.title: Schedule a meeting

meeting_detail.allow_join_before_host_no: Only after the host starts the meeting
meeting_detail.allow_join_before_host_yes: People can join before the host
meeting_detail.attendance_description: Track who is currently in the meeting and who has already joined.
meeting_detail.description: Update the meeting details, control the meeting lifecycle, and review attendance.
meeting_detail.edit_description: These settings stay deliberately lightweight so you can adjust the meeting without leaving the dashboard.

errors.allowed_users_required: Add at least one invited user before saving an invite-only meeting.
errors.clipboard_unavailable: Clipboard is not available in this browser.
errors.copy_failed: Failed to copy the meeting link.
errors.load_requests_failed: Failed to load pending access requests.
errors.moderation_failed: Failed to update the access request.
errors.start_required: Choose both a date and a time before saving the scheduled meeting.
errors.title_required: Enter a meeting title before saving.

form.allow_join_before_host: Allow participants to join before the host
form.allowed_user_ids_description: Enter one Matrix user ID per line. The host is always allowed automatically.

meeting_detail.allowed_users_not_required: No fixed list for this policy
meeting_detail.moderation_description: Approve or reject guests who asked to join this meeting.

policy_help.host_approval: People with the link can request access and stay outside the room until you decide.
policy_help.invite_only: Only the Matrix user IDs listed below can enter this meeting.
policy_help.open: Anyone with the meeting link can enter, subject to the host start policy.

status_summary.cancelled: This meeting was cancelled before it opened, so no one else can enter now.
status_summary.ended: This meeting has already ended, so its settings are now read-only.
status_summary.live_host: The meeting is live and participants can enter according to the current access policy.
status_summary.live_participant: The meeting is live. Whether you can enter depends on the current access policy and host controls.
status_summary.scheduled_host: This meeting is ready but has not started yet. Participants may still be waiting for you to open it.
status_summary.scheduled_participant: This meeting has not started yet. What happens next depends on whether the host opens it or your access needs approval.

action_summary.can_join: You can enter this meeting now.
action_summary.closed: No further action is needed here because the meeting is already closed.
action_summary.live_host: You can join the meeting now, share the link, or end it when it is finished.
action_summary.pending_approval: Refresh this page after the host responds to your access request.
action_summary.request_access: Send an access request if you still need to join this meeting.
action_summary.review_details: Review the meeting details before taking the next step.
action_summary.scheduled_host: Start the meeting when the team is ready, or update its details before it begins.
action_summary.wait_for_host: Wait for the host to start the meeting, then refresh if this page does not update yet.

meeting_detail.title: Meeting details

meeting_closed.body: "{{title}}" is closed and is no longer accepting new joins.
meeting_closed.title: This meeting is closed

not_invited.body: "{{title}}" is limited to specific invited Matrix users.
not_invited.title: You are not on the invited list

pending_approval.body: Your request for "{{title}}" was sent. You can join as soon as the host approves it.
pending_approval.title: Waiting for host approval

next_step.meeting_closed: This meeting is no longer accepting joins. Go back to home if you need another room.
next_step.not_invited: You cannot enter until the host changes the invited list or shares a different meeting.
next_step.pending_approval: The host still needs to approve your request. Refresh this page after they respond.
next_step.rejected: You can send another request if your participation is still needed.
next_step.request_access: Send an access request now, then stay on this page until the host responds.
next_step.wait_for_host: The host must start the meeting first. Refresh this page if it does not update automatically.

request_access.body: "{{title}}" requires host approval. Send a request and wait for the host to review it.
request_access.title: Ask to join this meeting

rejected.body: Your earlier request for "{{title}}" was declined. You can send a new request if you still need access.
rejected.title: Your request was declined

wait_for_host.body: "{{title}}" is scheduled, and the host has not opened entry yet.
wait_for_host.title: Waiting for the host to start

room_chat.title: Room chat
room_chat.heading: Room chat
room_chat.description: Messages are sent through the Matrix room and stay available with the room timeline.
room_chat.empty_state: No messages yet. Start the conversation for everyone in this room.
room_chat.composer_hint: Press Enter to send. Use Shift+Enter for a new line.
room_chat.read_only: You can read this room’s messages, but you do not have permission to send new ones.

room_note.title: Shared note
room_note.heading: Shared note
room_note.description: Use the room topic as a shared agenda, announcement, or follow-up note for everyone in the call.
room_note.empty_state: No shared note yet. Add agenda items, links, or next steps for everyone in the room.
room_note.editor_placeholder: Write an agenda, announcement, or follow-up notes
room_note.editor_hint: Press Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to save.
room_note.read_only: You can view the shared note, but you do not have permission to update it.

rageshake_request_modal.body: Another user on this call is having an issue. In order to better diagnose these issues we'd like to collect a debug log.
rageshake_request_modal.title: Debug log request

audio_tab.effect_volume_description: Adjust the volume at which reactions and hand raised effects play.

settings.background_blur_label: Blur the background of the video
settings.blur_not_supported_by_browser: (Background blur is not supported by this device.)
settings.feedback_tab_body: If you are experiencing issues or simply would like to provide some feedback, please send us a short description below.
settings.opt_in_description: <0></0><1></1>You may withdraw consent by unchecking this box. If you are currently in a call, this setting will take effect at the end of the call.

preferences_tab.developer_mode_label_description: Enable developer mode and show developer settings tab.
preferences_tab.introduction: Here you can configure extra options for an improved experience.
preferences_tab.reactions_play_sound_description: Play a sound effect when anyone sends a reaction into a call.
preferences_tab.reactions_show_description: Show an animation when anyone sends a reaction.
preferences_tab.show_hand_raised_timer_description: Show a timer when a participant raises their hand
